bounded_at_most_one_rework.description: Same zero/one evidence as an unbounded loop, interpreted as an at-most-one domain.

loop_unbounded_control.description: Singleton loop control where ALG-0024 should preserve ALG-0023's unbounded rework behavior.

multi_body_loop_choice.description: Two singleton rework bodies around the same anchor should compile as a loop-body choice.

nested_choice_loop_context.description: The same body-choice loop embedded in sequence context.

one_iteration_only.description: A loop cut should not fire when no zero-iteration exit is observed.
